svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" agent="Claude" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram id="medallion-architecture" name="Medallion Architecture"> <mxGraphModel dx="1071" dy="741" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1654" pageHeight="1169" math="0" shadow="1"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="2" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle; whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=22;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#1a1a2e;" value="Medallion Architecture — Data Layers" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="1000" x="100" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="3" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle; whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=12;fontStyle=2;fontColor=#555555;" value="Raw ingestion → Cleaning & Aggregation → Serving Layer" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="24" width="1000" x="100" y="62" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="100" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=36;fillColor=#E3F2FD;strokeColor=#1565C0; fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;fontColor=#1565C0;rounded=1;arcSize=5;" value="INGESTION" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="350" width="200" x="40" y="110" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="101" parent="100" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#BBDEFB;strokeColor=#1565C0;fontSize=11;" value="<b>Kafka Topic: "orders"</b>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="170" x="15" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="102" parent="100" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E3F2FD;strokeColor=#1565C0;fontSize=10;" value="Message format: JSON
Key: order_id
Value: order payload" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="170" x="15" y="110" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="103" parent="100" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E8EAF6;strokeColor=#3949AB; fontSize=10;fontStyle=3;align=left;" value="{ order_id, user_id,
 product, category,
 amount, quantity,
 status, timestamp }" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="170" x="15" y="186" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="104" parent="100" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E3F2FD;strokeColor=#1565C0; fontSize=10;fontStyle=2;" value="No transformation
Source of truth" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="170" x="15" y="282" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="200" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=36;fillColor=#FFF8E1;strokeColor=#F57F17; fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;fontColor=#F57F17;rounded=1;arcSize=5;" value="🥉 BRONZE LAYER" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="350" width="220" x="290" y="110" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="201" parent="200" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFE082;strokeColor=#F57F17;fontSize=11;" value="<b>delta/raw_orders</b>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="190" x="15" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="202" parent="200" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFF8E1;strokeColor=#F57F17;fontSize=10;" value="Output mode: APPEND
All raw events preserved
No data is deleted" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="190" x="15" y="110" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="203" parent="200" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFDE7;strokeColor=#F9A825; fontSize=10;fontStyle=3;align=left;" value="Schema:
order_id, user_id, product
category, amount, quantity
status, event_time" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="190" x="15" y="186" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="204" parent="200" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFF8E1;strokeColor=#F57F17;fontSize=10;" value="✓ ACID transactions
✓ Time travel (history)
✓ Parquet format" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="190" x="15" y="282" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="300" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=36;fillColor=#E8F5E9;strokeColor=#2E7D32; fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;fontColor=#2E7D32;rounded=1;arcSize=5;" value="🥈 SILVER LAYER" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="350" width="240" x="560" y="110" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="301" parent="300" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#A5D6A7;strokeColor=#2E7D32;fontSize=11;" value="<b>delta/aggregated</b>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="210" x="15" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="302" parent="300" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E8F5E9;strokeColor=#2E7D32;fontSize=10;" value="Output mode: UPDATE
Tumbling window: 1 min
Watermark: 2 min (late data)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="210" x="15" y="110" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="303" parent="300" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#F1F8E9;strokeColor=#558B2F; fontSize=10;fontStyle=3;align=left;" value="Schema:
window_start, window_end
category, total_revenue
order_count, avg_order_value
max_order_value, total_units" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="210" x="15" y="186" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="304" parent="300" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E8F5E9;strokeColor=#2E7D32;fontSize=10;" value="✓ Business aggregations
✓ Ready for dashboards" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="210" x="15" y="292" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="400" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=36;fillColor=#EDE7F6;strokeColor=#4527A0; fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;fontColor=#4527A0;rounded=1;arcSize=5;" value="SERVING LAYER" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="350" width="230" x="850" y="110" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="401" parent="400" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#D1C4E9;strokeColor=#4527A0;fontSize=11;" value="<b>Streamlit Dashboard</b>
localhost:8501" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="200" x="15" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="402" parent="400" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#EDE7F6;strokeColor=#4527A0; fontSize=10;align=left;" value="Reads Bronze:
• Recent orders table
• Status breakdown
• Order distribution" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="200" x="15" y="116" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="403" parent="400" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#EDE7F6;strokeColor=#4527A0; fontSize=10;align=left;" value="Reads Silver:
• Revenue by category
• Revenue over time
• Windowed KPIs" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="200" x="15" y="210" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="404" parent="400" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#D1C4E9;strokeColor=#4527A0; fontSize=10;fontStyle=2;" value="Auto-refresh: 5 seconds" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="200" x="15" y="304" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="500" edge="1" parent="1" source="100" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1; exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0; fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#1565C0; strokeColor=#1565C0;strokeWidth=2.5; labelBackgroundColor=#FFFFFF;" target="200" value="Spark Streaming
writeStream (append)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="501" edge="1" parent="1" source="200" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1; exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0; fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#F57F17; strokeColor=#F57F17;strokeWidth=2.5; labelBackgroundColor=#FFFFFF;" target="300" value="Spark Streaming
window + aggregate"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="502" edge="1" parent="1" source="300" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1; exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0; fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#2E7D32; strokeColor=#2E7D32;strokeWidth=2.5; labelBackgroundColor=#FFFFFF;" target="400" value="delta-rs batch read
(no JVM needed)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="503" edge="1" parent="1" source="200" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;dashed=1; exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=1;entryDx=0;entryDy=0; fontSize=10;strokeColor=#9673A6;strokeWidth=1.5; endArrow=none;" target="400" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="400" y="510" /> <mxPoint x="965" y="510" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
